files.desc: Master entryway and quick overview table of available AI guides
Detailed system architecture, multi-process block flows, request sequences, IPC contracts, coordinate scaling calculations, COM staleness pitfalls, and window PID locking pattern
Function-by-function reference specifications: Screenshot dataclass, PID-based window locking, UIA coordinate normalisation, box-cap logic in Overlay, fuzzy string scoring
Tutor container routing and state shell
Responsive command popup input and settings bar UI
Fullscreen coordinate canvas placing pulsars on target bounds; caps highlight box to 50x50 px centered on element center
Tauri JS interfaces mapping React commands to Rust bindings
Python processing loop: locks target window by PID before OCR, normalises UIA screen-space coords to screenshot space, runs capture+OCR+UIA context merging
Model router connecting prompt compilers to Ollama / Groq endpoints
OCR pipeline attempting native Windows WinRT OCR with EasyOCR fallbacks
Display capture engine (dxcam/ImageGrab); records both post-thumbnail screenshot dimensions and pre-thumbnail physical screen dimensions in Screenshot dataclass
Attach steps and map text strings to screen coordinates via fuzzy metrics
UI Automation tree traverser; accepts target_pid to resolve a fresh COM element after the OCR wait; returns screen-absolute coordinates without manual offset
Z-order window scanner; accepts target_pid to restrict scan to a specific process, enabling PID-based window locking across the OCR phase
Rust native backend managing system trays, shortcuts, and global click hook threads
Workspace setup script actions and dev tool definitions
Developer onboarding specs and standard local install instructions
